@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "InheritanceDesign" {
  class Bond <<C>> 
  class Stock <<C>> 
  class Car <<C>> 
  class House <<C>> 
  
  abstract Security <<A>> #0286AB
  
  
}


class BankAccount<<C>> 

abstract Property <<A>>#0286AB 


Bond -->Security : extends
Stock-->Security:extends
Car--|>Property: implements
House --|>Property:implements



BankAccount -[hidden]d-> Asset
Asset <|-- Security
Asset<|-right- Property
Asset <--up-BankAccount




note right of InheritanceDesign.java.lang.Override::toString()
    This method returns a string representation\nof this object.\nIt's useful for debugging purposes.
end note

@enduml
